title: deduplicate APPS.md — remove 473 old-format duplicate rows
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Pruning the App Garden
gist.blurb: We swept through the community app showcase and cleared out over 400 duplicate entries. The garden is looking much tidier now!
gist.summary: Cleaned up the community showcase by removing 473 duplicate entries caused by mixed table formats.
gist.impact: The APPS.md showcase is now much easier to read and navigate without duplicate or misformatted rows.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Nomnom creature cleaning up a messy archive. Nomnom eating duplicate paper records to tidy up the space.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and the round tan Nomnom creature in a cozy wooden archive room. Nomnom is happily eating a tall stack of duplicate paper records while the bee organizes a neat bookshelf. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
